case_title: EYITEJUMADE ADETOKUNBO SOGBESAN ET AL VS. TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES LP

docket_entries.description: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES LP IS NO LONGER DEFENDANT
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $971.00 FILED BY SOGBESAN, EYITEJUMADE ADETOKUNBO SOGBESAN, JINGLIN AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES 1190 MARKET STREET LP
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOGBESAN, EYITEJUMADE ADETOKUNBO SOGBESAN, JINGLIN AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES LP

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $971.00 FILED BY SOGBESAN, EYITEJUMADE ADETOKUNBO SOGBESAN, JINGLIN AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES LP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-25-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF EYITEJUMAKE ADETOKUNBO SOGBESAN RE: AMENDING CLAIM ADDING DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOGBESAN, EYITEJUMADE ADETOKUNBO SOGBESAN, JINGLIN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE THE AMENDED CLAIM FOR BOTH DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
